# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed.

## Testing

List the commands you ran and any relevant output.

## Generated artifacts

- [ ] I updated source files (`spec.toml`/`body.md` or `canonical.md`) for any change that affects generated output.
- [ ] I rebuilt generated artifacts when the source changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the relevant validation commands from `.github/CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I updated tests and documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private data, or local workspace artifacts.
